$50000 美金派38500件T-Shirt.

$1.3 美金一件。

GOALS:
-By Monday Oct. 28 have 10,000 t-shirts printed (Made in the USA) in advance of the Nov. 1 game being played in Dallas. That arena has a capacity of 21,000 seats.
-By Thursday Oct. 31 have 10,000 additional t-shirts printed for the Nov. 3 game happening in San Antonio. AT&T Center has a capacity of 18,000 seats.
-By Sunday Dec. 1 have 18,500 t-shirts prepared for the game in HOUSTON on Jan. 18 so that there is one t-shirt available for every seat. Let's send a message!

（支援新疆）今日你唔支持新疆人 他日外國都唔需要支持我地香港人
